name: reliability-kit
description: Trustworthy test foundations + spec-first. test-foundations: a language-adaptive 4-layer test rig (L0 quality · L1 unit · L2 integration · L3 E2E) optimized on BOTH axes (quality × speed), diagnose → scaffold → guide, with a single `verify` entry the slice baseliner adopts. spec-first: fuzzy request → real problem + falsifiable acceptance test-list (WHAT-to-test) + now/punt cut, fed to slice as a sharpened task + scope tokens (the front of the trust loop).
